title: State steam locomotive
doc_html:
§160.2. State steam locomotive

            There shall be an official state steam locomotive. The official state steam locomotive shall be the 2-8-2 Mikado class of steam locomotives. Its use on official documents of the state and with the insignia of the state is hereby authorized.

            Acts 2022, No. 191, §1.
doc_text:
§160.2.  State steam locomotive
There shall be an official state steam locomotive.  The official state steam locomotive
shall be the 2-8-2 Mikado class of steam locomotives.  Its use on official documents of the
state and with the insignia of the state is hereby authorized.
Acts 2022, No. 191, §1.
